name: EUSOL Biotech Co., Ltd.
summary: Eusol Biotech Co.,Ltd. focuses on developing drugs for unmet medical needs. Its pipeline includes ES135, a recombinant human acidic fibroblast growth factor (rhFGF1) for repairing neuron function; and SM-1, a 3-in-1 capsule containing 3 commercial drugs with sedative effect. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
